title: Implement money rounding correctly across the tricky edge cases
task: Implement roundCents(amount) in src/round.js per the docstring: round a monetary amount to whole cents, with halfway values rounding away from zero. `npm test` must pass. Do NOT modify test/round.test.js.
notes: Under-specified-feeling task whose naive reading (Math.round(amount*100)/100) fails hidden edge cases: Math.round breaks ties toward +Infinity so negatives are wrong, and binary FP under-representation drops a cent for 1.005 / 1.255 / 2.675. The naive impl passes only 3/5 tests; a correct sign-aware, epsilon-nudged implementation passes all. The file_not_contains TODO guards against a no-op submission.
